global_instructions: Implement a 1920x1080 kiosk-optimized, sharp-cornered NOC dashboard. Dark theme is mandatory. Typography uses JetBrains Mono strictly. Preserve all existing data-testid attributes and core class names.

layout_spacing_strategy.overall: Grid density. Do NOT leave unused white space. 1920x1080 kiosk strictly filled (100vh exact fit, no page scrolling outside of specific table containers).
layout_spacing_strategy.corners: Zero border-radius. Absolute sharp 0px corners on everything. Use corner cutouts/crosshairs via pseudo-elements (provided in App.css `.card`) to elevate tech military feel.
layout_spacing_strategy.typography: JetBrains Mono for literally everything structural/tabular. Uppercase heavily used for labels.
layout_spacing_strategy.wazuh_page: Implement a full terminal table: black bg, 100% width grid, sticky header, monospace text.
layout_spacing_strategy.alerts_page: List with colored left-borders matching severity (Red/Amber/Cyan). Ack/Delete buttons should look like tactical terminal commands (e.g. `[ ACK ]`).
